revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |- style="text-align: center;" | width="30%" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|Preceded by:
''' {{{before}}} ''' | width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|''' {{{title}}} '''
{{{years}}} | width="30%" rowspan="{{{rows}}}"|Succeeded by:
''' {{{after}}} '''
{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |- style="text-align: center;"

revision.comment: Template:Start succession box moved to Template:S-start
revision.text: {| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |- style="text-align: center;"
{{start box}} |- style="text-align: center;"
{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |- style="text-align: center;"

{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%" |- style="text-align: center;"
<noinclude> ----
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Update with new example at bottom. instructions to come
/* S-ptd */ edited s-tul to s-ptd...my fault
Added small drop shadow to start box; removed links in examples
Added small drop shadow to start box; removed links in examples
don't override the default appearance, styling should be set in stylesheets for consistency + <includeonly>
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" |- style="text-align: center;" ---- '''S-Start''' is the initial component in a template series for succession boxes. It replaces the previous formats for succession tables but still allows for most of their use indirectly. If anyone finds a succession template not in this standard, contact [[User:KuatofKDY|KuatofKDY]]. ==Templates Discussed on this Page== This template is to be used in coordination with the following: ::[[Template:s-start]] - Opens a new Wikitable ::[[Template:s-bef]] - For listing predecessors ::[[Template:s-aft]] - For listing successors ::[[Template:s-ttl]] - For listing titles ::[[Template:end]] or [[Template:end box]] - For closing Wikitables ::[[Template:s-hou]] - For house/family information ::[[Template:s-non]] - For no successors ::[[Template:s-new]] - For new titles ::[[Template:s-vac]] - For vacant titles (predecessor or successor) ::[[Template:s-inc]] - For incumbants ::[[Template:s-tul]] - For titular monarchs (legitimate but not ruling) ::[[Template:s-ptd]] - For pretenders (unable to rule due to alternate power) ==Instructions for Use== To use, follow these instructions:
:Enter the start field so the program recognizes the table
::{{s-start}}
:Enter the name of the predecessor
::{{s-bef|before=[['''Enter Predecessor here''']]}}
:Enter the title of the person on whose page you are working.
::{{s-ttl|title=[['''Enter Title here''']] :Also, enter the years during which they held that title.
::|years=[['''Enter start date here''']]-[['''Enter end date here''']]}}
:Enter the name of the successor:
::{{s-aft|after=[['''Enter Successor here''']]}}
:If they held additional titles after, place the following and repeat as necessary:
::|-
:Once everything is done, type:
::{{end}}
===S-start, s-bef, s-ttl, s-aft, end=== That is how to do the most simple one. When it is done, it will look like this:
::{{s-start}}
::{{s-bef|before=[['''Enter Predecessor here''']]}}
::{{s-ttl|title=[['''Enter Title here''']] ::|years=[['''Enter start date here''']]-[['''Enter end date here''']]}}
::{{s-aft|after=[['''Enter Successor here''']]}}
::{{end}}
Which will look something like this: {{s-start}} {{s-bef|before=Martin}} {{s-ttl|title=King of Europe|years=1492-1528}} {{s-aft|after=Robert}} {{end}} ===Advanced features for succession boxes=== ====Rows==== A row marker can be created in nearly all the templates immediately following the "'''s-'''" field. They help designate if someone gained a position in office from another person, or lost a position while in office, as well as other more complex scenarios. In most fields, simply type: ::{{s-...|'''row=INSERT NUMBER OF ROWS HERE'''|...}} The number corresponds to the number of rows this name or title overlaps in regard to the other rows. Lists of title-holders are usually in order of the granting of the title, beginning with the oldest titles held. All successive titles should be noted, though titles tied together permanently can be listed in the same field. ==Row separators== Remember to place |- between every row on the list. This text is already imbedded into most of the templates but if you are ending with [[Template:s-vac]], place this character or the computer will not recognize a new row. ===Predecesors=== ====S-new==== To create a table that begins with a newly created title, use this (entering the reason behind the title's creation is optional): Template:s-new (with others) ::{{s-start}} ::{{s-new|reason=ENTER REASON FOR TITLE}} ::{{s-ttl|title=TITLE OF PERSON|years=INSERT YEARS HERE}} ::{{s-aft|after=INSERT PREDECESSOR HERE}} ::{{end}} Which looks like: {{s-start}} {{s-new|reason=Conquest of Africa}} {{s-ttl|title=King of Africa|years=1820-1830}} {{s-aft|after=Amal}} {{end}} ====S-inc==== To create a table for someone who is the incumbant (current title holder), use the following: Template:s-non (with others) ::{{s-start}} ::{{s-bef|before=INSERT PREDECESSOR HERE}} ::{{s-ttl|title=TITLE OF PERSON|years=INSERT START YEAR–present}} ::{{s-inc}} ::{{end}} Which looks like: {{s-start}} {{s-bef|before=George}} {{s-ttl|title=King of North America|years=2001-present}} {{s-inc}} {{end}} ===Titles and Offices=== ====S-ttl==== To create a table for someone ruled with the aide of another (regent, coruler, &c.), it is integrated into the standard s-ttl template. Entering a regent is always optional as is entering the title-holder's dates or when the regent(s) ruled. Currently this template supports up to three regents. Instructions: Template:s-reg (with others) ::{{s-start}} ::{{s-bef|before=INSERT PREDECESSOR HERE}} ::{{s-ttl|title=TITLE OF PERSON|years=INSERT YEARS HERE ::|regent1=TITLE OF REGENT|years1=INSERT YEARS HERE}} ::|regent2=TITLE OF REGENT|years2=INSERT YEARS HERE}} ::|regent3=TITLE OF REGENT|years3=INSERT YEARS HERE}} ::{{s-aft|after=INSERT SUCCESSOR HERE)}} ::{{end}} Which looks like: {{s-start}} {{s-bef|before=Philip}} {{s-ttl|title=Queen of Antarctica|years=1889-1914 |regent1=Philip|years1=1889-1893 |regent2=Anthony|years2=1893-1895 |regent3=Elizabeth|years3=1895-1897}} {{s-aft|after=Margaret}} {{end}} ====S-tul==== Titular rulers are people who legitimately deserve a title yet are somehow incapable of securing it, as in the case of [[Louis XVII of France]], heir to the throne during the early years of the [[French Revolution]]. Titular rulers generally mean that their title will again be inherited by someone with power and remains only temporarily suspended. There is generally only one titular claimant to a title. To use this code, do the following: ::{{s-start}}
::{{s-bef|before=PREDECESSOR}}
::{{s-tul|title=TITLE|years=YEARS CLAIMED|reason=REASON WHY TITULAR}}
::{{s-aft|after=SUCCESSOR}}
::{{end}}
When complete, this form appears as thus: {{s-start}} {{s-bef|before=Andrew}} {{s-tul|title=King of Australia|years=1620-1675|reason=Australia not Settled}} {{s-aft|after=Christian}} {{end}} ====S-ptd==== [[Pretenders]] are people who may or may not have a rightful claim to a title, but regardless do not possess any legitimate authority. [[Bonnie Prince Charles]], or Charles III to the [[Jacobitism|Jacobites]], is probably the most famous case of a pretender. While he was the legitimate heir to his father, the [[Glorious Revolution]] overruled that power in favour of his half-sister. Therefore, he lost his legitimacy to govern but still claimed his hereditary titles. Pretenders are not always successive, as titular leaders generally are, and there can be multiple pretenders at the same time (as in France's [[Legitimist]]s and [[Orleanist]]s). To use this code, do the following: ::{{s-start}}
::{{s-bef|before=PREDECESSOR}}
::{{s-ptd|title=TITLE|years=YEARS CLAIMED|reason=REASON WHY PRETENDER}}
::{{s-aft|after=SUCCESSOR}}
::{{end}}
When complete, this form appears as thus: {{s-start}} {{s-bef|before=Marlin}} {{s-ptd|title=Despot of Hawaii|years=1827-1832|reason=Hawaii Annexed to Britain 1824}} {{s-aft|after=Yasu}} {{end}} ===Predecessors and Successors=== ====S-non==== To create a table for someone whose title expired, went extinct, or otherwise went into disuse upon its abandonment or their death OR for a title that needs description but does not fall under the other predecessor or successor forms, use the following (this form requires |- if it is used in a complex table}: Template:s-non (with others) ::{{s-start}} ::{{s-bef|before=INSERT PREDECESSOR HERE}} ::{{s-ttl|title=TITLE OF PERSON|years=INSERT YEAR HERE}} ::{{s-non|reason=GIVE BRIEF REASON WHY NO MORE TITLE (eg. Extinct)}} ::{{end}} Which looks like: {{s-start}} {{s-bef|before=Chinggis}} {{s-ttl|title=King of Asia|years=1263-1320}} {{s-non|reason=Conquest by
Arabian Empire}} {{end}} ====S-vac==== Vacant titles are not currently held by anyone, often known as [[interregnum]] periods for monarchs. This table cell can go before or after the title of the individual and is meant to designate if they have no predecessor and/or successor, although the title is not extinct. If the last or next title holder are known, that information can be filled into the form. Template:s-vac (with others) To create a table that begins with a vacant title, use this: ::{{s-start}} ::{{s-vac|last=LAST PERSON TO HOLD TITLE}} ::{{s-ttl|title=TITLE OF PERSON|years=INSERT YEARS HERE}} ::{{s-aft|after=INSERT SUCCESSOR HERE}} ::{{end}} Which looks like: {{s-start}} {{s-vac|last=Alois}} {{s-ttl|title=King of Madagascar|years=1620-1641}} {{s-aft|after=Windig}} {{end}} To create a table that ends with a vacant title, use this: ::{{s-start}} ::{{s-bef|before=INSERT PREDECESSOR HERE}} ::{{s-ttl|title=TITLE OF PERSON|years=INSERT YEARS HERE}} ::{{s-vac|next=NEXT PERSON TO HOLD TITLE}} ::{{end}} Which looks like: {{s-start}} {{s-bef|before=Naga}} {{s-ttl|title=Dictator of Japan|years=1912-1934}} {{s-vac|next=Kyo}} {{end}} ===Optional s- related templates=== ====S-hou==== This template is for the top of a succession list, directly beneath the s-start, and establishes which royal house a person is in, and gives their birth and death dates. If you do not know the day and month, leave a | and fill out the rest. For unknown birth or death dates, type '''Unknown''; for living people, type '''Living'''. To use, do the following:
::{{s-start}}
::{{s-hou|ENTER NAME OF HOUSE HERE|DAY AND MONTH OF BIRTH|YEAR OF BIRTH|DAY AND MONTH OF DEATH|YEAR OF DEATH}}
::{{s-bef|before=[[INSERT PREDECESSOR HERE]]}}
::{{s-ttl|title=[[ENTER TITLE HERE]] ::|years=[[ENTER START DATE HERE]]-[[ENTER END DATE HERE]]}}
::{{s-aft|after=[[INSERT SUCCESSOR HERE]]}}
::{{end}}
Which will look something like this: {{s-start}} |-style="text-align: center; background: #ccffcc;" |align="center" colspan="3"|'''House of Lucanzzo'''
'''Cadet Branch of the House of Petre'''
Born: 18 March 1920; Died: 31 December 1987 {{s-bef|before=Albert}} {{s-ttl|title=King of Greenland|years=1972-1987}} {{s-aft|after=Francois}} {{end}} ==Complete example== Using the rows feature of the templates, very advanced tables can be created to help in situations with people who hold many posts, especially [[British Prime Minister]]s. The following is a hypothetical chart with at least one use of all the forms above: {{s-start}} |-style="text-align: center; background: #ccffcc;" |align="center" colspan="3"|'''House of San Miguel'''
'''Cadet Branch of the House of López'''
Born: 19 January 1958; Died: Living {{s-new|reason=Dowry from father}} {{s-ttl|title=Queen of India|years=1972–1983|regent1=Michael|years1=1972–1975}} {{s-aft|after=Arnold}} {{s-bef|rows=3|before=Elizabeth}} {{s-ttl|title=Lady Supreme of Oceana|years=1975–1983}} {{s-vac|next=Jilian}} |- {{s-ttl|title=Empress of Arabia|years=1975–1993}} {{s-non|reason=Title merged with
Great Khanna of Asia}} |- {{s-ttl|title=Grand Duchess of Europa|years=1975–1999}} {{s-aft|rows=2|after=Felicia}} {{s-vac|last=Karl von Igorstein}} {{s-ttl|title=Chief Sultana of Africa|years=1993–1999}} |- {{s-new|reason=Consolidation of Asia}} {{s-ttl|title=Great Khanna of Asia|years=1993–present}} {{s-inc|rows=3|heir=Marcus}} |- {{s-bef|rows=2|before=Diane}} |width="40%" style="text-align: center;" rowspan="1"|'''* TITULAR – NEVER RULED *'''
''Queen of Australia''
(2003–present)
* '''Reason for Succession Failure: *'''
Constitutional Monarchy
(1954–present) |- {{s-ptd|title=Lady of the Isles|years=2003–present|reason=Declared a Republic}} {{end}}

revision.comment: putting so much in the <noinclude> is probably not a great idea
revision.text: <includeonly> {| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" |- style="text-align: center;" </includeonly> <noinclude> See [[Template_talk:S-start]]. </noinclude>

<includeonly> {| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" |- style="text-align: center;" </includeonly> <noinclude> See [[Template:S-start/Instructions|Instructions]] for how to use. </noinclude>

<includeonly> {| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" |- style="text-align: center;" </includeonly> <noinclude> See [[Template:S-start/Instructions|Instructions]] for how to use. [[fr:Modèle:Start box]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" |- style="text-align: center;" </includeonly><noinclude>See [[Template:S-start/Instructions|Instructions]] for how to use. [[fr:Modèle:Start box]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" |- style="text-align: center;" </includeonly><noinclude>See [[Template:S-start/Instructions|Instructions]] for how to use. [[Category:Succession templates|S-start]] [[fr:Modèle:Start box]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Unprotected Template:S-start: problem saving this page
revision.text: <includeonly>{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" |- style="text-align: center;" </includeonly><noinclude>See [[Template:S-start/Instructions|Instructions]] for how to use. [[Category:Succession templates|S-start]] [[fr:Modèle:Start box]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" |- style="text-align: center;" </includeonly><noinclude>See [[Template:S-start/Instructions|Instructions]] for how to use. [[Category:Succession templates|S-start]] [[fr:Modèle:Start box]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: any new table rows should be defined in new templates - tell me if this breaks anything
revision.text: {| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0.5em auto; clear: both; font-size:95%;" <noinclude> |- |''Start of centred table'' |} See [[Template:S-start/Instructions|Instructions]] for how to use. [[Category:Succession templates|S-start]] [[fr:Modèle:Start box]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: rm "clear:both" per [[Template talk:S-start#Why clear?|talkpage request]], set up /doc transclusion
revision.text: {| class="wikitable" style="margin:0.5em auto; font-size:95%;" <noinclude> |''Start of centred table'' |} {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} <!--NB Add metadata to the /doc page linked above, not here; thanks!--> </noinclude>

{| class="wikitable" style="clear:both; margin:0.5em auto; font-size:95%;" <noinclude> |''Start of centred table'' |} {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} <!--NB Add metadata to the /doc page linked above, not here; thanks!--> </noinclude>

{| class="wikitable" style="margin:0.5em auto; font-size:95%;" <noinclude> |''Start of centred table'' |} {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} <!--NB Add metadata to the /doc page linked above, not here; thanks!--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: all bottom-of-page templates should be cleared without the need for in-page code.
revision.text: {| class="wikitable" style="margin:0.5em auto; font-size:95%;clear:both;" <noinclude> |''Start of centred table'' |} {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} <!--NB Add metadata to the /doc page linked above, not here; thanks!--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: make it possible to turn off clear:both
revision.text: {| class="wikitable" style="margin:0.5em auto; font-size:95%;{{#if:{{{noclear|}}}||clear:both;}}" <noinclude> |''Start of centred table'' |} {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} <!--NB Add metadata to the /doc page linked above, not here; thanks!--> </noinclude>

{| class="wikitable" style="margin:0.5em auto; font-size:95%;{{#if:{{{noclear|}}}||clear:both;}}" <noinclude> |''Start of centred table'' |} {{documentation}} <!--NB Add metadata to the /doc page linked above, not here; thanks!--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: add css class per talk page request
rmv extra line break, per request
Changed protection level of Template:S-start: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
border issue fixed in site CSS - reverting inline style fix by [[Special:Contributions/Ahecht|Ahecht]] ([[User talk:Ahecht|talk]])
Add noprint class as [[Category:Exclude in print]] which was used haven't worked for years

revision.text: <includeonly>{| class="wikitable succession-box" style="margin:0.5em auto; font-size:95%;{{#if:{{{noclear|}}}||clear:both;}}" </includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Fix too small font per [[MOS:FONTSIZE]]. Many or most of the templates that are nested within this one use small tags, which have the effect of reducing font sizes below the allowable size (to 85% of 95%).
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
per edit request on talk page - include role="presentation"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 58 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:S-start]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {| role="presentation" class="wikitable succession-box noprint" style="margin:0.5em auto; font-size:small;{{#if:{{{noclear|}}}||clear:both;}}" <noinclude> |''Start of centred table'' |} {{documentation}} {{/TemplateData}} <!--NB Add metadata to the /doc page linked above, not here; thanks!--> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
